entries.title: Payroll End-to-End: Direct Deposit & W-2s, Financial Statements, and Connect Your AI Assistant

items.text: Payroll, end-to-end — run payroll in-house and get direct-deposit (NACHA) bank files, printable paystubs, W-2 and Form 941 preparation, and automatic general-ledger posting.
Union payroll deductions — dues, fringe, and benefit deductions calculated and applied automatically on every payroll run.
Financial statements — Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow reports straight from your books, plus GAAP chart-of-accounts templates matched to your entity type.
Connect your AI assistant — SaaSy is now an MCP server, so Claude or any MCP-compatible assistant can work with your CRM, projects, notes, and tasks over a secure OAuth or API-key connection.
Run multiple businesses under one login — switch between the companies you belong to without signing out.
A sidebar that fits your business — navigation modules adapt to your industry with sensible presets, and you can customize which modules appear.
New connections — Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Gusto, each with guided setup.
Ready-to-use document templates — MSA, NDA, invoice, estimate, and common tax forms available in every workspace.
Scheduling links now let invitees cancel or reschedule their own bookings.
Meeting attendees become CRM contacts automatically — created and de-duplicated from your calendar activity.
Email templates — send a test to yourself before a campaign, and see per-template send analytics on the templates list.
Honest numbers everywhere — customer health, churn risk, and billing show only real data now; anything we can't compute yet is labeled "not scored" instead of a placeholder value.
Ask SaaSy renders tables, streams responses faster, and reliably keeps context across long conversations.
A more polished, living interface — subtle motion and atmosphere across the portal, with WCAG AA contrast in both light and dark themes.
2026 tax accuracy — updated federal W-4 Step 2 withholding, Social Security wage-cap handling, and state unemployment rates.
Password-reset emails now open a working reset page, and a failed sign-in shows an inline error instead of redirecting you away.
Signing in with a Microsoft or Google account now completes reliably end-to-end.
Security hardening across every service — tighter tenant isolation, expanded audit logging for MFA and password changes, and rate limits on public endpoints.

entries.title: Built for Contractors: Construction Billing, Payroll & Government Contracting

items.text: Construction billing & job costing — AIA-style pay applications, job-level P&L, vendor bills, and general ledger for contractors running project work.
Native payroll engine — run payroll in-house with W-4 handling, per-employee calculations, and certified-payroll support for prevailing-wage jobs.
Union & labor compliance — certified payroll with per-fund Taft-Hartley fringe remittance and an OLMS LM-2 financial-reports connector.
Government contracting — a SAM.gov bid board for federal opportunities, plus automatic screening of vendors and AP against the federal debarment (exclusions) list.
People & Talent — a full HR lifecycle module that connects to payroll: hiring, onboarding, records, and reviews in one place.
Proactive Actions — SaaSy now surfaces a live feed of recommended actions and acts on the ones you approve, instead of waiting to be asked.
AI CFO now tracks federal tax deadlines in your weekly executive brief.
Multi-account connections — link more than one account per provider and set per-user ownership, so teammates only see what they connected.
Onboarding carries your signup details straight into your business profile, with an industry picker that tailors your setup from the first screen.
Broader out-of-the-box coverage — sales-tax rates and nexus thresholds for all 50 states + DC, NAICS 2022 industry data, HIPAA and PCI DSS control libraries, and a public-holiday calendar.
Contact Sales now captures real leads and confirms delivery, and email change/verification links work even when you're signed out.
Dashboards and workflow stats now show real counts from your data — the last fabricated placeholder metrics are gone.
Verification, welcome, and password-reset emails now dispatch reliably; sign-in no longer gets stuck in a session-expired redirect loop.
Guided journey across your whole business — next-best-step recommendations from formation through launch, operations, and scale
Ask SaaSy in context — get advice on any step or screen, now with cited sources and a clear professional-advice boundary
My Work — one unified task list across all your businesses and connected tools
SOP library — author standard operating procedures with AI and collect employee sign-off
AI document drafting — proposals and business docs rendered on branded, letterhead PDFs
Continuous-close accounting keeps your books always up to date
Proactive regulatory monitoring with alerts when rules that affect you change
What-if business simulation to model decisions before you make them
Industry-aware onboarding auto-configures your workspace and chart of accounts
Automatic sales-tax nexus detection across states
Resolved several dashboard crashes (customers, payroll runs, and insights pages)
AI CFO — a weekly executive brief, with a short branded video, that reads your numbers and tells you what to do next
Anonymous peer benchmarking — see how your key metrics compare against similar businesses
CRM Projects — manage delivery with tasks, notes, files, and an AI project health score
Research Agent — live company, market, and competitor intelligence grounded in real-time web data
Outcome Ledger — every recommendation now tracks its measured dollar impact in a Value Delivered report
CSV export for contacts, companies, projects, and invoices
Sign in with Google or Microsoft (SSO)
Connect Google and Microsoft email & calendar with two-way sync
New connectors — Slack, Square, DocuSign, Calendly, QuickBooks, FreshBooks, and Gusto
Automatic company enrichment during onboarding from public registry and web signals
Audit log viewer with filters, per-event detail, and CSV export
Self-service GDPR data export, anonymization, and account deletion
Two-factor authentication (2FA) with trusted-device skip
Active sessions page to review and revoke signed-in devices
Step-up verification before sensitive account changes
IP allowlist and blocklist controls in Security settings
ROI savings calculator on pricing page
Country selector in onboarding with US/Canada state/province support
Reduced signup form from 6 fields to 4
Organization ID remembered between login sessions
Added Content Security Policy headers
Cmd+K command palette for quick navigation
Customer health scoring with churn prediction
Dashboard daily briefing with AI recommendations
Stripe-powered billing with annual/monthly toggle
3-step onboarding wizard with stage detection
httpOnly cookie auth replacing localStorage tokens
